verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All is well all is well Angels and men rejoice For tonight darkness fell Into the dawn of love's light Sing A-le Sing Alleluia

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All is well all is well Let there be peace on earth Christ is come go and tell That He is in the manger Sing A-le Sing Alleluia

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All is well all is well Lift up your voice and sing Born is now Emmanuel Born is our Lord and Savior Sing Alleluia Sing Alleluia All is well

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Born is now Emmanuel Born is our Lord and Savior Sing Alleluia Sing Alleluia All is well
